source.section: 2.2 - Air-to-Ground Modes > 2.2.3 - EXP (Expanded) Modes > 2.2.3.2 - EXP2 (Patch Map)

steps.action: Make sure air-to-ground mapping (MAP) mode or EXP1 mode is selected (see previous sections).
Press the Sensor Control Switch in the direction of the radar screen (RIGHT) to slave the TDC (Throttle Designation Controller) to the current radar screen (diamond should be visible).
Press on the OSB (Option Select Button) next to EXP2.
Press and hold TDC DEPRESS control (« ENTER »).
While TDC DEPRESS is held, slew the trapezoidal corral over the desired region you want to set as a patch map (zoom) using the TDC controls.
Release the TDC DEPRESS control to enter EXP2 mode. Corral
